title: Memory Cards
description: Play the Memory Card matching game free online. Flip cards to find matching pairs. Track your moves and beat your best score. No install needed.

howToUse.label: Flip a card
howToUse.description: Click any face-down card to reveal its emoji.

howToUse.label: Find the match
howToUse.description: Click a second card. If both cards show the same emoji, they stay face-up as a matched pair.

howToUse.label: No match
howToUse.description: If the two cards don't match, they flip back face-down after a short delay. Remember where they were!

howToUse.label: Win
howToUse.description: Match all 8 pairs to complete the game. Try to do it in as few moves as possible.

faq.question: How many pairs are there?
faq.answer: The board has 16 cards (4×4 grid) forming 8 pairs. Find all 8 pairs to win.

faq.question: Is my best score saved?
faq.answer: Yes. Your best result (fewest moves) is saved in your browser's local storage.

faq.question: Can I flip more than two cards at once?
faq.answer: No. While two cards are visible waiting to be checked, new flips are blocked until the result is resolved.

faq.question: Does the card order change on each game?
faq.answer: Yes. Cards are shuffled randomly at the start of every new game.

faq.question: Does this game work offline?
faq.answer: Yes. Everything runs entirely in your browser with no server communication.
